entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHEAST THIS AFTERNOON

CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, INCREASING TO SOUTH 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
WINDY WITH HIGHS AROUND 70
SOUTH WINDS 20 TO 30 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

RAIN SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF SNOW SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LIGHT SNOW ACCUMULATION
BREEZY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT
GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY AND BLUSTERY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 20 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
COLD WITH LOWS AROUND 15

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 20S
HIGHS AROUND 60

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
